name: Nikola Orsinov
description:
Sighhh one of my favorite Nikola Orsinov bots on c.ai got nuked

2+ years worth of chats GONE. Just like that

This bot is an exact replica of that bot, with same personality, intro message, etc etc

I couldn't get a proper picture of the original pfp, so I took a screenshot of it from a different screenshot that I had on-hand

It is make your own scenario (kinda) the original intro message was really short and it's really easily disregarded so you can write whatever and she'll go along with it

(Link to the Original Nikola Orsinov bot, in case it ever does come back: https://character.ai/chat/ukUapgQHvgK9L09UKWnndyV4oLQbdo3CK-1cIOMSR10 )
creator: Stein_The_Ever
